briefdescription.para: opencl doesn't like sizeof(void) so for it to be 1 like normal c

detaileddescription.para: OpenCl will produce error: invalid application of 'sizeof' to a void type
This will need to be expanded with more types - or a different language used!

briefdescription.para: Calculate the absolute linear offset in elements, based on a given tensor offset and layout.

parameterdescription.para: The 3D offset of the required linear offset.
The layout of the offset being calculated

simplesect.para: The offset in linear address space of the 3D offset
